title: CatalogVersion
description: A catalog version's metadata: the immutable identity/hash/title/description/sources derived from the package, plus the mutable governance fields and audit attribution. The package documents are never embedded here.

baseWorkflowId.description: The base workflow id (no version suffix).

versionNumber.description: The 1-based version number assigned by the store.

workflowId.description: The versioned workflow id ({baseWorkflowId}-v{versionNumber}) runs execute under.

title.description: The title, extracted from the workflow's info.title.

description.description: The description, from the workflow's info.description (falling back to info.summary), if any.

securityTags.description: The security tags (KVP labels) — the input to tag-based row authorization (§14.2), distinct from the free-form tags. Optional for backward compatibility with versions catalogued before security tags existed.

sources.description: The source documents in the package (name + type), addressable individually.

hash.description: The SHA-256 of the canonical package, hex-encoded.

createdBy.description: The actor that added the version.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor of the last metadata change, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the metadata was last changed, if ever.

obsoletedBy.description: The actor that marked the version obsolete, if it is.

obsoletedAt.description: When the version was marked obsolete, if it is.

runnable.description: Whether the package carries a compiled workflow executor assembly an execution host can run.

CatalogOwnerInfo.title: CatalogOwnerInfo
CatalogOwnerInfo.description: The accountable governance owner of a cataloged workflow.

name.description: The owning person or team's display name.

url.description: An optional link (e.g. a runbook or owning-team page).

CatalogSourceInfo.title: CatalogSourceInfo
CatalogSourceInfo.description: A reference to one source document within a version's package.

name.description: The source name (the workflow's sourceDescriptions name), used to address the document.

type.description: The source document kind (e.g. openapi, asyncapi), if the workflow declared it.

SecurityTagInfo.title: SecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) on a catalog version: the input to tag-based row authorization (§14.2).
